kinyarwanda.explore_drag_the_protractor_name_the_a: Shakashaka — kurura porotarakteri, wite inguni izina
kinyarwanda.acute_90_right_90_obtuse_90_180_straig: Ntoya < 90°, igororotse = 90°, igari 90–180°, isanzuye = 180°, irenze > 180°. Porotarakteri yahimbwe hafi ya 1801; icyitegererezo cy'igice-cy'uruziga kiracyakoreshwa mu ishuri ryose rya geometiri.
kinyarwanda.challenges_estimate_classify_measure: Ibibazo — gereranya, shyira mu byiciro, pima
kinyarwanda.estimation_builds_spatial_sense_precis: Kugereranya byubaka kumva umwanya; gupima neza byubaka akamenyero ka porotarakteri. Common Core 4.MD.5–7: inguni nk'ibice by'uruziga rwuzuye (1/360 by'uruziga).
kinyarwanda.complementary_sum_to_90_supplementary_: Uzuzanya zigera kuri 90°; unganya kuri 180°; inguni zihanganye zingana; inguni zo mu nda zisimburana zihura iyo imirongo iteganye. Aya makuru ane afungura ibimenyetso byinshi by' amashuri yisumbuye.
kinyarwanda.tools_bisector_second_ray_calculator: Ibikoresho — mugabanyamo-kabiri, umurongo wa kabiri, mubaruzi
kinyarwanda.bisect_cut_in_half_the_construction_wi: Kugabanyamo-kabiri = gucamo kabiri (kubaka na kompazi + umurongo ugororotse biri muri Euclid Igitabo I, Igitekerezo 9). Ibikoresho bigezweho: porotarakteri, umusumeno wa miter, teodolite — igitekerezo kimwe, gusa cyagenwe neza.
kinyarwanda.click_to_get_personalized_angle_tips: Kanda kugira ngo ubone inama z'inguni zawe bwite!
kinyarwanda.click_to_get_personalized_angle_tips_2: Kanda kugira ngo ubone inama z'inguni zawe bwite!
kinyarwanda.look_at_the_angle_on_the_protractor_nu: Reba inguni kuri porotarakteri (umubare wahishwe). Ni dogere zingahe?
kinyarwanda.opposite_angles_formed_by_intersecting: Inguni zihanganye zikozwe n'imirongo yambukiranya; buri gihe zingana
kinyarwanda.angles_that_share_a_common_vertex_and_: Inguni zisangira impinga imwe n'urubavu rumwe
kinyarwanda.two_rays_overlap_exactly_no_rotation: Imirongo ibiri yuzuzanya neza. Nta kuzunguruka.
kinyarwanda.less_than_a_right_angle_pizza_slice_le: Ntoya kuri inguni igororotse. Igice cya pizza, "ntoya kuri kare".
kinyarwanda.exactly_90_corner_of_a_square_perpendi: Neza 90°. Impinga ya kare. Imirongo iringaniye.
kinyarwanda.between_right_and_straight_wider_than_: Hagati y'igororotse n'isanzuye. Igari kuri impinga ya kare.
kinyarwanda.half_rotation_the_two_rays_form_a_stra: Kigice cy'ukuzunguruka. Imirongo ibiri ikora umurongo ugororotse.
kinyarwanda.complete_turn_the_two_rays_overlap_exa: Ukuzunguruka kuzuye. Imirongo ibiri yuzuzanya neza (nka 0°, ariko yazengurutse yose).
kinyarwanda.co_interior_consecutive_interior: Zo mu nda zifatanye (zo mu nda zikurikirana)
kinyarwanda.interactive_geometry_references_pick_a: Amareme ya geometiri afatanya — hitamo insanganyamatsiko.
kinyarwanda.interior_angle_sum_n_2_180_for_any_n_s: Igiteranyo cy'inguni zo mu nda = (n − 2) × 180° ku mpande-nyinshi zose z'impande n. Buri nguni yo hanze y'impande-nyinshi ISANZWE = 360°/n. Igiteranyo cy'inguni zo hanze buri gihe = 360°.
kinyarwanda.soh_cah_toa_sine_opp_hyp_cosine_adj_hy: SOH-CAH-TOA: Sinusi = Ihanganye/Ipotenuse, Kosinusi = Ibangikanye/Ipotenuse, Tangente = Ihanganye/Ibangikanye. Imimaro ya trigonometiri yerekana ibipimo by'impande z'umutatu ugororotse; yagejejwe ku nguni zose binyuze mu ruziga rw'urugero.
kinyarwanda.these_angles_their_trig_values_are_wor: Izi nguni + uduciro twazo twa trigonometiri bikwiye kwibukwa — bigaragara buri gihe mu mibare, fiziki, n'ubwubatsi.
kinyarwanda.1_rad_180_57_296_1_180_0_01745_rad_1_g: 1 rad = 180/π ≈ 57.296°. 1° = π/180 ≈ 0.01745 rad. 1 gon = 0.9°. Mibaruzi myinshi ifite uburyo bwa dogere/radiyani — menya neza ko uri mu buryo bukwiye!
kinyarwanda.angle_problem_solving_shortcuts: ⚡ Inzira ngufi zo gukemura ibibazo by'inguni
kinyarwanda.bearings_measured_clockwise_from_north: Icyerekezo gipimwa MU CYEREKEZO CY'ISAHA guhera mu majyaruguru. Busole isanzwe y'utudomo 16 ifite 22.5° hagati y'ibyerekezo bikurikirana.
kinyarwanda.three_views_of_the_same_trigonometric_: Uburebe butatu bw'iteganya rimwe rya trigonometiri. Kurura umunyerezo w'inguni (cyangwa uburebure bw'umunara) — buri iyerekana rivugurura icyarimwe. Hanyuma ukore ikizamini cy'ikibazo-gihindutse: kemura igipimo nyakuri ukoresheje iyerekana rimwe gusa.
kinyarwanda.change_the_angle_and_watch_all_three_u: Hindura inguni maze urebe uko byose uko ari bitatu bivugurura icyarimwe — ibi ni byo "igitekerezo kimwe, iyerekana ritatu" bisobanura.
kinyarwanda.pisa_is_roughly_56_m_tall_leaning_4_to: (Pisa ifite hafi 56 m z'uburebure, ibera ≈ 4° uyu munsi)
kinyarwanda.each_quiz_gives_you_partial_info_use_t: Buri kizamini kiguha amakuru make. Koresha imikoranire wabonye haruguru kugira ngo ubare agaciro kabuze.
kinyarwanda.tip_rearrange_tan_opp_adj_if_you_know_: Inama: ongera utegure tan(θ) = ihanganye/ibangikanye — niba uzi θ n'urubavu rumwe, ushobora kemura urundi. Niba uzi impande zombi, fata arctan.
kinyarwanda.quantity_with_both_magnitude_and_direc: Ingano ifite ubunini N'icyerekezo byombi. Ishushanyijwe nk'akambi. Ingero: umuvuduko, imbaraga, iyimuka.
kinyarwanda.scalar_just_a_number_mass_temperature_: Sukalari = umubare gusa (misa, ubushyuhe, igihe). Vegiteri = ubunini + icyerekezo.
kinyarwanda.place_tail_of_second_at_head_of_first_: Shyira umurizo wa kabiri ku mutwe wa mbere. Ingaruka = umurizo wa mbere kugeza ku mutwe wa kabiri.
kinyarwanda.place_tails_together_diagonal_of_paral: Shyira imirizo hamwe. Umurongo-nkiranyi w'igicaparalelo = ingaruka.
kinyarwanda.vector_v_at_angle_v_v_cos_v_y_v_sin: Vegiteri v ku nguni θ: vₓ = v·cos θ, v_y = v·sin θ.
kinyarwanda.v_v_v_y_v_z_pythagoras_in_any_dimensio: |v| = √(vₓ² + v_y² + v_z²). Pythagore mu bipimo byose.
kinyarwanda.magnitude_1_v_v_v_often_called_the_dir: Ubunini 1. v̂ = v / |v|. Kenshi bita "icyerekezo" cya v.
kinyarwanda.a_b_a_b_cos_gives_scalar_zero_when_per: a·b = |a||b|cos θ. Bitanga sukalari. Zeru iyo iringaniye. Munsi ya zeru iyo inguni > 90°.
kinyarwanda.a_b_a_b_sin_n_gives_vector_perpendicul: a×b = |a||b|sin θ · n̂. Bitanga vegiteri IRINGANIYE ku byombi. Ubunini = ubuso bw'igicaparalelo.
kinyarwanda.curl_fingers_from_a_to_b_thumb_points_: Zinga intoki uhereye kuri a kugeza kuri b. Igikumwe cyerekeza icyerekezo cya a×b. (Ibipimo by'ukuboko kw'iburyo.)
kinyarwanda.c_a_c_b_generates_a_plane_or_line_of_v: c₁·a + c₂·b. Bitanga urwego (cyangwa umurongo) wa vegiteri.
kinyarwanda.newton_s_2nd_law_f_ma_net_force_is_vec: Itegeko rya 2 rya Newton: F = ma. Imbaraga zuzuye ni igiteranyo-vegiteri cy'imbaraga zose.
kinyarwanda.airplane_heading_wind_vector_ground_ve: Icyerekezo cy'indege + vegiteri y'umuyaga → umuvuduko ku butaka (igiteranyo-vegiteri).
kinyarwanda.equilateral_triangle_square_regular_he: Umutatu ufite impande zingana, kare, impande-esheshatu isanzwe. Ni yo mpande-nyinshi zisanzwe zonyine zishobora kuvuna urwego.
kinyarwanda.interior_angle_must_divide_360_triangl: Inguni yo mu nda igomba kugabanya 360°. Umutatu 60° (×6), kare 90° (×4), impande-esheshatu 120° (×3). Impande-eshanu 108° ntigabanya 360° → ntishobora kuvuna yonyine.
kinyarwanda.8_in_total_combine_multiple_regular_po: 8 muri rusange. Huza impande-nyinshi nyinshi zisanzwe; iboneza rimwe kuri buri mpinga.
kinyarwanda.aperiodic_tiling_never_repeats_exactly: Ikweto ridasubiramo — ntirisubiramo neza na rimwe. Bumwe-mpande bwa 5. Byatumye havumburwa quasicrystals.
kinyarwanda.hexagonal_tiling_minimizes_total_perim: Ikweto ry'impande-esheshatu rigabanya umuzenguruko wose ku buso buhawe. Byagaragajwe na Hales (1999). Impamvu inzuki zikoresha impande-esheshatu.
kinyarwanda.each_region_points_closest_to_one_seed: Buri karere = utudomo turi hafi y'akadomo kamwe k'"imbuto". Bigaragara mu kamere (amabara ya girafe, ibyatsi by'ibumba, imiterere y'ingirabuzimafatizo).
kinyarwanda.on_a_hyperbolic_plane_regular_pentagon: Ku rwego rwa hiperubolike, impande-eshanu zisanzwe (n'izindi miterere myinshi) ZISHOBORA kuvuna. Uruhererekane rwa M.C. Escher rwa "Circle Limit".
kinyarwanda.colored_squares_that_must_match_neighb: Kare zifite amabara zigomba guhuza n'abaturanyi ku mpande. Zishobora kwigana imashini ya Turing → ikibazo cy'ikweto ntigishobora kwemezwa muri rusange.
kinyarwanda.a_single_tile_that_aperiodically_tiles: Ikweto rimwe rivuna urwego mu buryo budasubiramo (imiterere ya "hat" na "spectre"). Kuvumbura gukomeye kwa vuba.
kinyarwanda.in_a_right_triangle_a_b_c_where_c_is_t: Mu mutatu ugororotse, a² + b² = c² aho c ari ipotenuse. Amatsinda y'imibare (a, b, c) yubahiriza ibi bita amatatu ya Pythagore. Itatu "ry'ibanze" nta bwo rifite igabanywa rusange.
kinyarwanda.for_positive_integers_m_n_with_no_comm: Ku mibare yuzuye ipfuye m > n idafite igabanywa rusange kandi atari yombi ibango, a = m² − n², b = 2mn, c = m² + n². Gerageza m=2, n=1 → (3,4,5).
kinyarwanda.circle_has_most_area_for_a_perimeter: Uruziga rufite ubuso bwinshi ku muzenguruko
kinyarwanda.isoperimetric_inequality_4_a_p_equalit: Ukudahwanya kw'umuzenguruko-ungana: 4πA ≤ P². Guhwanya gusa ku ruziga. Impamvu amashununu y'isabune + imibumbe bizenguruka.
kinyarwanda.sphere_has_most_volume_for_a_surface_a: Umupira ufite ingano nyinshi ku buso bw'hejuru
kinyarwanda.3d_version_of_above_single_bubbles_are: Icyitegererezo cya 3D cyo haruguru. Amashununu amwe ni imipira; amashununu ahujwe ahurira ku nguni za 120°.
kinyarwanda.regular_hexagons_tile_most_efficiently: Impande-esheshatu zisanzwe zivuna neza kurusha izindi
kinyarwanda.honeycomb_conjecture_proven_1999_by_ha: Ikigereranyo cy'ubuki (cyagaragajwe 1999 na Hales): ikweto ry'impande-esheshatu rifite uburebure bw'inkuta buke ku buso hagati y'igabanya iryo ari ryo ryose.
kinyarwanda.triangle_is_most_rigid_shape: Umutatu ni imiterere ikomeye kurusha izindi
kinyarwanda.cannot_be_deformed_without_changing_si: Ntushobora guhindurwa uteshuye utahinduye uburebure bw'impande. Impamvu ibiraro + ubwato bw'igisenge bikoresha imitatu.
kinyarwanda.square_tiles_fill_the_plane_with_no_ga: Amakweto ya kare yuzuza urwego nta myanya. Nk'uko bimeze ku kare-refu + ibicaparalelo.
kinyarwanda.hexagonal_packing_of_circles_fills_90_: Gupakira impande-esheshatu kw'inziga byuzuza ~90.7% by'urwego (biboneka). Gupakira kare gusa ~78.5%.
kinyarwanda.fcc_hcp_both_achieve_74_density_kepler: FCC + HCP byombi bigera kuri ~74% by'ubwinshi (ikigereranyo cya Kepler, cyagaragajwe 2014 na Hales).
kinyarwanda.only_5_in_3d_tetrahedron_cube_octahedr: 5 gusa muri 3D: tetraedero, kibe, okitaedero, dodekaedero, ikosaedero. (Platon yabivuze.)
kinyarwanda.tetrahedron_is_simplest: Tetraedero ni yo yoroshye kurusha izindi
kinyarwanda.4_vertices_6_edges_4_faces_minimum_3d_: Impinga 4, inkombe 6, uburanga 4. Imiterere 3D ntoya kurusha izindi.
kinyarwanda.for_sphere_inscribed_in_cylinder_h_2r_: Ku mupira wanditse muri silindere (h = 2r): V_mupira = 2/3 × V_silindere. (Ibisubizo Archimède yakundaga.)
kinyarwanda.16_vertices_32_edges_24_faces_8_cells_: Impinga 16, inkombe 32, uburanga 24, utugari 8. Bishobora gufungurwa mu bibe 8 (nk'uko Salvador Dalí abivuga).
kinyarwanda.single_sided_surface_cut_down_middle_l: Ubuso bw'urubavu rumwe. Ca hagati → uruziga rumwe rurerure. Ca kuri 1/3 → impeta ebyiri zifatanye (imwe ya Möbius).
kinyarwanda.closed_non_orientable_surface_inside_o: Ubuso bufunze budashobora kwerekezwa. Imbere = hanze. Bishobora gukorwa muri 3D gusa hamwe no kwiyambukiranya.
kinyarwanda.curve_of_constant_width_not_a_circle_c: Umuverure w'ubugari buhoraho (atari uruziga!). Ushobora kuzengeza igati ku maroleri atatu ya Reuleaux neza. Ibyuma byo gutobora bibikoresha.
kinyarwanda.two_parallel_polygons_rotated_360_2n_c: Impande-nyinshi ebyiri ziteganye zizengurutswe 360°/2n, zihujwe n'imitatu. Tetraedero ni antipurizimu yoroshye kurusha izindi.
kinyarwanda.has_chirality_left_right_handed_forms_: Ifite chiralité — imiterere y'ukuboko kw'ibumoso + kw'iburyo. Kimwe mu bintu bibiri bya chiral bya Archimède (ikindi ni dodekaedero y'isnabu).
kinyarwanda.equation_z_xy_straight_lines_lie_on_it: Ingingano z = xy. Imirongo igororotse iri hejuru yayo mu miryango ibiri. Ikoreshwa muri Pringles + ibisenge bimwe.
kinyarwanda.gomboc_2006_is_first_known_mono_monost: "Gömböc" (2006) ni yo ya mbere izwi ya mono-monostatike — kuringaniza kumwe guhamye + kumwe kudahamye. Nka Weeble yiyunamura.
kinyarwanda.cannot_tile_plane_alone_gaps_but_7_egg: Ntishobora kuvuna urwego yonyine — imyanya. Ariko imiterere 7 y'igi ikora itsinda nk'impande-esheshatu.
kinyarwanda.common_in_crystals_cube_nacl_octahedro: Bikunze kuboneka mu makristali: kibe (NaCl), okitaedero (diyama, fluorite), dodekaedero (pyrite, garnet).
kinyarwanda.truncated_icosahedron_60_carbons_like_: Ikosaedero yakemuwe. Karubone 60. Nk'ishusho y'umupira w'amaguru. Yavumbuwe 1985.
kinyarwanda.helical_10_5_base_pairs_per_turn_major: Iy'insinga, ~10.5 ipari-shingiro kuri buri kuzunguruka. Imiferege minini + mito. Umurambararo uhoraho ~2 nm.
kinyarwanda.hexagonal_prisms_with_rhombic_bottoms_: Purizimu z'impande-esheshatu zifite hasi ya rombe. Inzuki ntizibara mu bwenge — biofiziki igabanya ubuso bw'hejuru mu buryo bwa kamere.
kinyarwanda.drop_spaghetti_at_random_average_numbe: Ta spaghetti nta gahunda — impuzandengo y'umubare w'ahantu bihurira = (L/πd) × π × n. Bikoreshwa mu kubara π mu ishuri.
kinyarwanda.study_of_flags_comes_from_latin_vexill: Kwiga amabendera. Biva mu kilatini vexillum (ibendera ryitwaraga n'abasirikari b'amafarashi b'Abaroma).
kinyarwanda.keep_it_simple_a_child_can_draw_from_m: Rigire ryoroshye (umwana ashobora kurishushanya mu mutwe), koresha ikimenyetso gifite ubusobanuro, amabara y'ibanze 2-3, nta nyuguti cyangwa ikirango, gire uburyo budasanzwe.
kinyarwanda.most_common_2_3_e_g_france_germany_us_: Akunze cyane: 2:3 (urugero, Ubufaransa, Ubudage). Amerika ni 1:1.9. UK ni 1:2. Amwe adasanzwe: Ubusuwisi 1:1, Nepal atari kare-refu.
kinyarwanda.symbols_added_to_flag_stars_crosses_an: Ibimenyetso byongewe ku bendera (inyenyeri, imisaraba, inyamaswa). Amagambo ya heraldike asobanura aho biri.
kinyarwanda.upper_left_rectangle_about_1_4_the_fla: Kare-refu yo hejuru-ibumoso (hafi 1/4 by'ibendera). Inyenyeri z'Amerika zinjira hano. Ositaraliya, NZ nazo zikoresha imiterere ya canton.
kinyarwanda.hoist_side_attached_to_pole_fly_opposi: Hoist = uruhande rufatanye n'igiti. Fly = uruhande ruhanganye (rw'ubuntu).
kinyarwanda.red_courage_revolution_blood_blue_ocea: Umutuku = ubutwari, impinduramatwara, amaraso. Ubururu = inyanja, ikirere, ubwisanzure. Icyatsi = ubutaka, kamere, Isilamu. Umweru = amahoro, ubuziranenge. Umuhondo/Zahabu = ubukungu, izuba.
kinyarwanda.flying_flag_upside_down_where_asymmetr: Kumanika ibendera hejuru-hasi (aho ridahwanya mpande); kumanika ibendera ku gice cy'igiti = kwibuka abapfuye.
kinyarwanda.light_blue_with_map_un_or_compass_nato: Ubururu bworoheje bufite ikarita (LONI) cyangwa busole (NATO). Ku bushake birinda ibimenyetso by'igihugu/idini.
kinyarwanda.flags_are_codified_geometry_every_nati: Amabendera ni geometiri yanditse. Buri bendera ry'igihugu rifite ibipimo nyabyo: igipimo cy'ingano, kode z'amabara, aho ibimenyetso biri, inguni z'inyenyeri.
kinyarwanda.x_12_means_x_inches_rise_per_12_inches: X:12 bisobanura X santimetero zo kuzamuka kuri 12 santimetero zo kwiruka mu buryo butambitse.
kinyarwanda.149_597_870_700_m_defined_exactly_ligh: 149,597,870,700 m. Byasobanuwe neza. Urumuri rufata ~8.3 iminota kwambuka 1 UA.
kinyarwanda.9_461_10_m_distance_light_travels_in_1: 9.461×10¹⁵ m. Intera urumuri rukora mu mwaka umwe wa Julian.
kinyarwanda.3_26_light_years_distance_at_which_1_a: ~3.26 imyaka-rumuri. Intera aho 1 UA igaragara nka 1 arcsecond.
kinyarwanda.165_au_2024_fastest_human_made_object_: ~165 UA (2024). Ikintu cy'umuvuduko mwinshi cyakozwe n'abantu kivuye muri sisitemu y'izuba. Kiracyohereza amakuru.
kinyarwanda.620_million_tons_of_h_he_every_second_: ~620 miliyoni z'ibiro bya H → He kuri buri segonda. Ritakaza ~4 miliyoni z'ibiro nk'ingufu (E = mc²).
kinyarwanda.stream_of_charged_particles_400_800_km: Umugezi w'uduce dufite amashanyarazi. ~400-800 km/s hafi y'Isi. Ukora amabengeza + ushushanya imizingo y'inyenyeri-nkubura.
kinyarwanda.solar_system_planets_dwarf_planets: 🪐 Imibumbe ya sisitemu y'izuba + imibumbe mito
kinyarwanda.axial_tilt_drives_seasons_tilt_90_mean: Kubera kw'urumurongo-rwibumba gutera ibihe. Kubera > 90° bisobanura kuzunguruka guhindukira (Venus, Uranus, Pluton).
kinyarwanda.can_you_cross_each_of_the_7_bridges_of: Ushobora kwambuka buri kiraro cy'ibiraro 7 bya Königsberg inshuro imwe gusa?
kinyarwanda.no_euler_proved_1736_you_need_each_nod: Oya. Euler yagaragaje (1736) ko usaba buri nodi kugira urwego rw'igiharwe, uretse ahari nodi 2 z'urwego rw'igiharwe-kidasanzwe. Königsberg yari ifite nodi 4 z'urwego kidasanzwe. Byashinze teoriya y'imirongo-mvimvi.
kinyarwanda.using_only_compass_straightedge_constr: Ukoresheje kompazi + umurongo ugororotse gusa, ubaka kare ifite ubuso bumwe n'uruziga ruhawe.
kinyarwanda.impossible_is_transcendental_lindemann: Ntibishoboka. π ni transcendante (Lindemann 1882). Ntishobora kubakwa n'imikorere ya C+S mike.
kinyarwanda.construct_a_cube_with_twice_the_volume: Baka kibe gifite ingano inshuro ebyiri z'iya kibe gihawe ukoresheje kompazi + umurongo ugororotse.
kinyarwanda.impossible_requires_2_which_is_algebra: Ntibishoboka. Bisaba ∛2, ari algébrique y'urwego 3, ariko C+S itanga gusa imibare y'urwego 2ⁿ.
kinyarwanda.divide_an_arbitrary_angle_into_3_equal: Gabanya inguni iyo ari yo yose mu bice bitatu bingana ukoresheje kompazi + umurongo ugororotse.
kinyarwanda.impossible_in_general_some_specific_an: Ntibishoboka muri rusange. Inguni zimwe zihariye (urugero, 180°) zirashoboka. Origami ISHOBORA kugabanyamo-gatatu inguni iyo ari yo yose.
kinyarwanda.5_cases_separate_externally_tangent_in: Uburyo 5: zitandukanye, zikorana hanze, zambukiranya (utudomo 2), zikorana imbere, imwe iri mu yindi.
kinyarwanda.can_every_planar_map_be_colored_with_4: Buri karita y'urwego ishobora gushushanywa n'amabara 4 ku buryo uturere tubangikanye tudasangira ibara?
kinyarwanda.yes_proven_by_appel_haken_1976_first_m: Yego. Byagaragajwe na Appel + Haken (1976) — igitekerezo gikomeye cya mbere cyagaragajwe hifashishijwe mudasobwa.
kinyarwanda.what_path_from_a_to_b_b_lower_minimize: Ni iyihe nzira iva A ijya B (B iri hasi) igabanya igihe cy'ikintu kinyerera hasi ku mbaraga rukuruzi?
kinyarwanda.cycloid_posed_by_bernoulli_1696_solved: Cycloïde. Cyabajijwe na Bernoulli (1696). Cyakemuwe na Newton mu ijoro rimwe + n'abandi 4 barimo Leibniz.
kinyarwanda.cut_a_circular_pizza_into_8_sectors_wi: Ca pizza y'uruziga mu bice 8 ukoresheje incisi zinyura ku kadomo kamwe (atari ngombwa ikigo). Ibice bisimburana bifite ubuso bungana.
kinyarwanda.true_for_any_odd_multiple_of_4_sectors: Ni ukuri ku bice byose by'igiharwe-kwikuba-4. Bikora kuri 8, 12, 16, ...
kinyarwanda.for_what_radii_of_intersecting_circles: Ni izihe mirambararo y'inziga zambukiranya aho imiterere-y'ukwezi ("lune") + lentiye bifite ubuso bungana?
kinyarwanda.ratio_depends_solved_analytically_roma: Igipimo kiterwa — cyakemuwe mu buryo bw'isesengura. Geometiri y'urukundo iva mu gitabo cyo mu 1942.
kinyarwanda.intersection_of_two_perpendicular_cyli: Ihuriro rya silindere ebyiri ziringaniye z'umurambararo umwe.
kinyarwanda.has_4_vertices_looks_like_a_4_faced_cu: Ifite impinga 4, isa n'umusego w'uburanga 4. Ingano = (16/3)r³.
kinyarwanda.drop_a_needle_of_length_l_onto_paralle: Ta urushinge rw'uburebure L ku mirongo iteganye itandukanye na d. Ni iyihe amahirwe yo kwambuka umurongo?
kinyarwanda.2l_d_for_l_d_method_to_compute_by_drop: 2L/(πd) kuri L ≤ d. Uburyo bwo kubara π uta inshinge!
kinyarwanda.can_you_cut_a_circle_into_pieces_rearr: Ushobora guca uruziga mu bice ukongera ukabishyira mu kare y'ubuso bungana?
kinyarwanda.yes_laczkovich_1990_with_10_pieces_cho: Yego (Laczkovich 1990) — n'ibice ~10⁵⁰. Igiteke cy'ihitamo kirakenewe. Ntushobora gukoresha incisi z'ubwoko bw'imikasi; ibice ni bidasanzwe cyane.
kinyarwanda.can_you_cut_a_ball_into_pieces_rearran: Ushobora guca umupira mu bice ukongera ukawushyira mu mipira ibiri y'ingano imwe?
kinyarwanda.yes_requires_axiom_of_choice_non_measu: Yego — bisaba igiteke cy'ihitamo + ibice bidashobora gupimwa. Birwanya ubwenge ariko mu mibare ni ukuri.
kinyarwanda.why_do_soap_films_take_certain_shapes: Kuki inzuri z'isabune zifata imiterere imwe?
kinyarwanda.they_minimize_surface_area_catenoid_be: Zigabanya ubuso bw'hejuru. Caténoïde (hagati y'impeta), inkombe ya Plateau (amahuriro). Bitanga geometiri nziza.
kinyarwanda.simplest_regular_tiling_schl_fli_symbo: Ikweto risanzwe ryoroshye kurusha ayandi. Ikimenyetso cya Schläfli {4,4}.
kinyarwanda.3_hexagons_around_each_vertex_6_3_hone: Impande-esheshatu 3 zikikije buri mpinga. {6,3}. Ubuki. Byiza kurusha ibindi.
kinyarwanda.octagons_squares_4_8_8_hispanic_coloni: Impande-umunani + kare (4.8.8). Amashusho y'amakweto ya gikoloni y'Abesipanyoli.
kinyarwanda.dodecagons_triangles_3_12_12_some_pave: Impande-cumi-na-ebyiri + imitatu (3.12.12). Amabuye yo mu mihanda amwe.
kinyarwanda.just_rhombi_can_be_combined_to_make_pe: Rombe gusa. Zishobora guhuzwa kugira ngo zikore amakweto ya Penrose.
kinyarwanda.two_rhombi_fat_thin_aperiodic_never_re: Rombe ebyiri (yagutse + itagutse). Idasubiramo — ntirisubiramo. Bumwe-mpande bwa 5.
kinyarwanda.kite_dart_aperiodic_with_5_fold_symmet: Kayite + dari. Idasubiramo rifite bumwe-mpande bwa 5.
kinyarwanda.right_triangles_arranged_in_pinwheels_: Imitatu igororotse yateguwe mu ma pinwheel. Idasubiramo. Ryakoreshejwe mu makweto ya Federation Square (Melbourne).
kinyarwanda.single_polygon_that_tiles_aperiodicall: Impande-nyinshi imwe ivuna mu buryo budasubiramo. Kuvumbura gukomeye kwa vuba na Smith, Myers, Kaplan, Goodman-Strauss.
kinyarwanda.improvement_on_hat_uses_only_direct_no: Guteza imbere kuri hat — rikoresha gusa amakweto ataziguye (adasubiwe).
kinyarwanda.5_sided_tiles_found_in_cairo_street_pa: Amakweto y'impande 5. Aboneka mu mihanda ya Kayiro. Buri kweto rifite inguni 4 za ~120° + imwe ya 90°.
kinyarwanda.use_2_vertex_types_14_distinct_ones_so: Akoresha ubwoko 2 bw'impinga. 14 atandukanye (bamwe barabijya impaka). Agoye kurusha aya Archimède.
kinyarwanda.divide_plane_into_cells_closest_to_eac: Gabanya urwego mu tugari turi hafi ya buri kadomo k'"imbuto". Bigaragara mu kamere (amabara ya girafe, amashununu).
kinyarwanda.triangle_mesh_with_property_that_no_po: Urusobe rw'imitatu rufite ikiranga ko nta kadomo kari mu ruziga-rukikije rw'umutatu uwo ari wo wose. Dual ya Voronoï.
kinyarwanda.15_distinct_convex_pentagon_shapes_can: Imiterere 15 itandukanye y'impande-eshanu iberamye ishobora kuvuna urwego. Iya nyuma yabonetse 2015 (Mann, McLoud, Von Derau). Marjorie Rice yabonye 4 nk'umukunzi mu myaka ya 1970.
kinyarwanda.heptagons_impossible_in_euclidean_tile: Impande-zirindwi (zidashoboka muri Euclide) zivuna urwego rwa hiperubolike hamwe na 3 zikikije buri mpinga. Byashushanyijwe na Escher.
kinyarwanda.square_tiles_with_curves_or_diagonals_: Amakweto ya kare afite imiverure cyangwa imirongo-nkiranyi. Icyerekezo kitagenwe → amashusho nk'ubuyobe.
kinyarwanda.latitude_longitude_in_decimal_degrees_: Latitude + longitude muri dogere za decimale. Lat: 0° = ekwateri, ±90° = utumaso. Lon: 0° = Greenwich, ±180° = hafi y'umurongo w'itariki mpuzamahanga.
kinyarwanda.at_each_vertex_you_need_3_polygons_who: Kuri buri mpinga, ukeneye impande-nyinshi 3+ zifite igiteranyo cy'inguni < 360° (ntibindi biba isanzuye cyangwa ntibishoboke). Ni ibihuriro 5 gusa bikora ku mpande-nyinshi zisanzwe.
kinyarwanda.v_e_f_2_holds_for_every_convex_polyhed: V − E + F = 2 ni ukuri ku buri mpande-nyinshi iberamye (harimo ibintu byose 5 bya Platon).
kinyarwanda.connecting_face_centers_of_a_platonic_: Guhuza ibigo by'uburanga bw'ikintu cya Platon bitanga "dual" yacyo. Kibe ↔ okitaedero; dodekaedero ↔ ikosaedero; tetraedero ↔ yo ubwayo.
kinyarwanda.13_semi_regular_solids_same_arrangemen: Ibintu 13 bisanzwe-igice — iboneza rimwe kuri buri mpinga, ariko ubwoko bwinshi bw'impande-nyinshi. Birimo ikosaedero yakemuwe (ishusho y'umupira w'amaguru).
kinyarwanda.4_regular_star_polyhedra_with_pentagra: Impande-nyinshi 4 z'inyenyeri zisanzwe zifite uburanga cyangwa impinga za pentagramme. Zitaberamye.
kinyarwanda.start_with_triangle_on_each_side_repla: Tangira n'umutatu. Ku rubavu rumwe rumwe, simbuza igice cyo hagati impande ebyiri z'umutatu muto. Subiramo. Umuzenguruko udashira, ubuso bushira.
kinyarwanda.start_with_triangle_remove_middle_smal: Tangira n'umutatu. Kuraho umutatu wo hagati (muto). Subiramo ku mutatu wose usigaye. Ingano ya Hausdorff log(3)/log(2) ≈ 1.585.
kinyarwanda.remove_middle_third_of_segment_repeat_: Kuraho igice cya gatatu cyo hagati cy'umurongo. Subiramo ku murongo wose usigaye. Ntushobora kubarwa ariko uburebure bwose ni zeru.
kinyarwanda.points_c_where_iterating_z_z_c_stays_b: Utudomo c aho gusubiramo z = z² + c bikomeza kuba mu mbibi. Amakuru adashira ku iyaguriro iryo ari ryo ryose. Ryavumbuwe 1980.
kinyarwanda.for_each_c_points_z_where_iterating_z_: Kuri buri c, utudomo z aho gusubiramo z = z² + c bikomeza kuba mu mbibi. Buri c gitanga itsinda rya Julia ritandukanye; hamwe bivuna itsinda rya Mandelbrot.
kinyarwanda.fold_a_strip_of_paper_in_half_repeated: Kunja igice cy'urupapuro kabiri kenshi; ufungure buri kunja kuri 90°. Cyangwa gusimbura gusubiramo kw'imirongo.
kinyarwanda.iterated_function_system_random_select: Sisitemu y'imimaro yo gusubiramo. Guhitamo nta gahunda amakarita 4 ya affine bitanga ishusho y'iyanana.
kinyarwanda.fractional_dimension_coastline_1_2_1_3: Ingano y'igice. Inkombe y'inyanja ~1.2-1.3 bitewe n'igihugu. Bifata "ubukarabari" hakurya y'ingano yuzuye.
kinyarwanda.defining_property_strict_self_similari: Ikiranga gisobanura. Kwisa-nyawe (Koch) cyangwa mu buryo bw'imibare (inkombe).
kinyarwanda.coastlines_trees_lungs_bronchi_blood_v: Inkombe z'inyanja, ibiti, ibihaha (bronches), imitsi y'amaraso, imiyoboro y'inzuzi, imisozi, ibicu, inkuba.
kinyarwanda.flat_plane_parallel_postulate_holds_an: Urwego rusanzuye. Igitekerezo-shingiro cy'imirongo iteganye kirakora. Inguni z'umutatu ziteranya neza kuri 180°.
kinyarwanda.surface_of_sphere_triangle_angles_sum_: Ubuso bw'umupira. Inguni z'umutatu ziteranya KURENZA 180°. Ikirenga gihuye n'ubuso. Bikoreshwa mu buyobozi bw'amato.
kinyarwanda.saddle_shaped_surface_triangle_angles_: Ubuso bufite imiterere y'intebe-farashi. Inguni z'umutatu ziteranya MUNSI ya 180°. Imirongo iteganye myinshi inyura ku kadomo katari ku murongo.
kinyarwanda.shortest_paths_on_a_surface_straight_l: Inzira ngufi ku buso. Imirongo igororotse (Euclide); inziga nini (umupira); imirongo ya hiperubolike.
kinyarwanda.largest_circles_on_a_sphere_equator_me: Inziga nini kurusha izindi ku mupira. Ekwateri + meridiyani. Indege zikurikira inzira z'uruziga runini.
kinyarwanda.euclidean_0_spherical_positive_hyperbo: Euclide = 0. Umupira = positifu. Hiperubolike = negatifu. Ukugoramye kugena geometiri.
kinyarwanda.on_sphere_of_radius_r_triangle_area_r_: Ku mupira w'umurambararo R, ubuso bw'umutatu = R² × (igiteranyo cy'inguni − π).
kinyarwanda.positions_on_earth_s_surface_use_spher: Ahantu ku buso bw'Isi hakoresha geometiri y'umupira (cyangwa mu buryo bwuzuye, ellipsoïdale).
kinyarwanda.nyc_to_tokyo_is_shortest_via_the_arcti: NYC kugeza Tokyo ni ngufi binyuze mu Arctique, atari mu buseruko bugororotse — iyo ni uruziga runini.
kinyarwanda.spacetime_is_curved_by_mass_energy_geo: Umwanya-gihe ugoramywa na misa-ngufi. Ba-géodésique inyura mu mwanya-gihe ugoramye NI zo nzira z'ibintu bigwa mu bwisanzure.
kinyarwanda.a_vertical_or_angled_gnomon_casts_a_sh: "Gnomon" ihagaze cyangwa ifite inguni itera igicucu. Uko Isi izunguruka, igicucu kigenda ku bimenyetso.
kinyarwanda.for_accuracy_gnomon_must_be_parallel_t: Kubera ukuri, gnomon igomba kuba iteganye n'urumurongo-rwibumba rw'Isi — inguni ku butambike = latitude y'aho.
kinyarwanda.dial_plate_perpendicular_to_gnomon_par: Urubaho rw'isaha ruringaniye na gnomon (ruteganye n'ekwateri). Imirongo y'amasaha itandukanye kimwe na 15°.
kinyarwanda.dial_plate_parallel_to_ground_hour_lin: Urubaho rw'isaha ruteganye n'ubutaka. Imirongo y'amasaha ntitandukanye kimwe — uburyo: tan(inguni y'umurongo w'isaha) = sin(latitude) × tan(inguni y'isaha).
kinyarwanda.dial_on_a_wall_hour_lines_depend_on_wa: Isaha ku rukuta. Imirongo y'amasaha iterwa n'azimut y'urukuta + latitude.
kinyarwanda.sundial_time_differs_from_clock_time_b: Igihe cy'isaha y'izuba gitandukanye n'igihe cy'isaha kugeza ~16 iminota mu mwaka wose. Bitewe n'inzira ya ellipsoïdale y'Isi + kubera k'urumurongo-rwibumba.
kinyarwanda.figure_8_trace_of_sun_s_position_at_sa: Umurongo w'ishusho ya 8 y'aho izuba riri ku isaha imwe buri munsi mu mwaka. Byerekanwa ku masaha y'izuba amwe agezweho.
kinyarwanda.sundial_shows_local_apparent_solar_tim: Isaha y'izuba yerekana IGIHE CY'IZUBA cy'aho kigaragara. Gitandukanye n'igihe cya gisivili ku itandukaniro rya longitude mu karere k'igihe + DST.
kinyarwanda.very_precise_sundials_with_corrections: Amasaha y'izuba anonosoye afite ivugurura ry'uburinganire bw'igihe + longitude. Anyaburinganire kugeza kuri segonda.
kinyarwanda.phi_1_61803398874989_irrational_roots_: φ (phi) ≈ 1.61803398874989... Idasobanutse. Imizi ya x² = x + 1.
kinyarwanda.a_line_divided_so_that_whole_larger_la: Umurongo ugabanyijwe ku buryo cyose : kinini = kinini : gito. (a+b)/a = a/b = φ.
kinyarwanda.ratio_of_consecutive_fibonacci_numbers: Igipimo cy'imibare ya Fibonacci ikurikirana kegera φ: 1, 1, 2, 3, 5, 8, 13, 21 → 21/13 ≈ 1.615.
kinyarwanda.long_side_short_side_remove_a_square_r: Urubavu rurerure / urubavu rugufi = φ. Kuraho kare → kare-refu isigaye na yo ni iya zahabu.
kinyarwanda.logarithmic_spiral_with_growth_factor_: Umuzingo wa logarithm ufite igipimo cy'ubukure φ kuri buri kimwe-cya-kane cy'ukuzunguruka. Bigereranywa na kare + imiheto ya Fibonacci.
kinyarwanda.ratios_of_pentagram_diagonals_to_sides: Ibipimo by'imirongo-nkiranyi ya pentagramme ku mpande = φ. Pythagore yari abizi.
kinyarwanda.spiral_arrangements_in_sunflowers_pine: Iboneza ry'umuzingo mu ndabyo z'izuba, ibibabi bya pine, amagi ya nautilus. Byerekana gupakira kwiza ku meristème akura.
kinyarwanda.often_claimed_in_parthenon_mona_lisa_e: Kenshi bivugwa muri Parthénon, Mona Lisa, n'ibindi — ibivugwa byinshi ntibishyigikiwe. Ubugeni nyabwo bw'igipimo cya zahabu: gukoresha kubishaka mu kinyejana cya 20 (Le Corbusier, Dali).
kinyarwanda.long_believed_humans_find_golden_ratio: Igihe kirekire bemeraga ko abantu babona igipimo cya zahabu ari cyo cyiza kurusha ibindi. Ibimenyetso bikomeye ni bike kuruta uko inkuru zizwi zivuga.
kinyarwanda.1_1_1_1_1_1_most_irrational_number_slo: φ = 1 + 1/(1 + 1/(1 + 1/(...))). Umubare udasobanutse kurusha iyindi — igice gikomeza kegereza buhoro kurusha ibindi.
kinyarwanda.active_research_area_can_solve_cubic_e: Akarere k'ubushakashatsi gakora. Ashobora gukemura ingingano za kibe (bidashoboka na kompazi + umurongo ugororotse gusa). Bihuza na algebra.
kinyarwanda.at_any_flat_foldable_vertex_mountain_f: Kuri buri mpinga ishobora gukunjwa neza, |# amakunja y'umusozi − # amakunja y'ikibaya| = 2.
kinyarwanda.at_a_flat_foldable_vertex_alternating_: Kuri impinga ishobora gukunjwa neza, inguni zisimburana zikikije impinga ziteranya kuri 180°.
kinyarwanda.standard_paper_can_be_folded_in_half_7: Urupapuro rusanzwe rushobora gukunjwa kabiri ~7 inshuro. Buri kunja rikuba kabiri ubugari. Nyuma ya 7, urupapuro rukomera cyane. Rekodi (n'ibikoresho byihariye + urupapuro runini): amakunja 12.
kinyarwanda.flat_sheet_can_fold_into_virtually_any: Urupapuro rusanzuye rushobora gukunjwa muri hafi imiterere iyo ari yo yose ya 3D hamwe n'amakunja ahagije. Origami igezweho iragoye cyane.
kinyarwanda.james_webb_space_telescope_sunshield_f: Ingabo-y'izuba ya James Webb Space Telescope yakunjwe mu kohereza (amahame ya origami), ifungurwa mu kirere.
kinyarwanda.folded_efficiently_to_fit_in_compartme: Yakunjwe neza kugira ngo ikwire mu cyumba, ifungurwa vuba.
kinyarwanda.origami_inspired_medical_stents_fold_t: Stent z'ubuvuzi zishingiye kuri origami zikunja bito mu kwinjiza, zaguka mu mutsi.
kinyarwanda.parallelogram_based_fold_lets_large_su: Ikunja rishingiye ku gicaparalelo rituma ubuso bunini (paneli y'izuba) buboneka buva ku bwoko buto bw'ikurura rimwe.
kinyarwanda.cuts_allowed_in_addition_to_folds_used: Incisi zemewe hiyongereyeho amakunja. Bikoreshwa mu bitabo bidasimbuka + ibyubatswe bya siyansi.
kinyarwanda.parallel_lines_converge_to_vanishing_p: Imirongo iteganye ihurira ku tudomo tw'ukuzimira. Akadomo 1 (kureba hasi mu muhanda), utudomo 2 (impinga y'inyubako), utudomo 3 (kureba hejuru mu munara).
kinyarwanda.where_parallel_lines_appear_to_meet_on: Aho imirongo iteganye igaragara ihurira ku murongo w'ikirere. Bigenwa n'aho urebera + icyerekezo cy'umurongo.
kinyarwanda.horizontal_line_at_viewer_s_eye_height: Umurongo utambitse ku burebure bw'ijisho ry'urebera. Utudomo twose tw'ukuzimira turi kuri wo (ku mirongo iteganye n'ubutaka).
kinyarwanda.objects_pointing_at_viewer_appear_comp: Ibintu byerekeza urebera bigaragara byegeranye. Gushushanya ukuboko kwerekeza urebera = imbogamizi.
kinyarwanda.divide_canvas_photo_into_9_equal_secti: Gabanya ikaraze/ifoto mu bice 9 bingana. Shyira ibigenderwaho ku mahuriro kubera imiterere ikora.
kinyarwanda.camera_tilted_off_horizontal_creates_u: Kamera ibereye iva ku butambike itera ubwoba, kutaba mu kwiringira, imbaraga.
kinyarwanda.sun_angle_determines_shadow_length_dir: Inguni y'izuba igena uburebure bw'igicucu + icyerekezo. Inguni nto (isaha ya zahabu) = ibicucu birebire + ibara ryoroheje.
kinyarwanda.brunelleschi_1413_demonstrated_mathema: Brunelleschi (~1413) yagaragaje uburebe bw'umurongo bw'imibare. Alberti yabushyize mu buryo (1435).
kinyarwanda.distant_objects_appear_bluer_less_dist: Ibintu bya kure bigaragara byubuye kandi bidasobanutse bitewe no gukwira kw'ikirere.
kinyarwanda.some_traditions_use_specific_angles_ra: Imigenzo imwe ikoresha inguni + ibipimo byihariye (amashusho ya geometiri y'Abayisilamu, mandala z'Abahindi, katedrali z'ikigotike).
kinyarwanda.mathematical_artist_impossible_objects: Umuhanzi w'imibare. Ibintu bidashoboka (imitatu ya Penrose), iyubakwa-nkweto, geometiri ya hiperubolike.
kinyarwanda.folding_angles_crease_patterns_produce: Inguni z'amakunja + amashusho y'amakunja bitanga ibishushanyo bya 3D biva mu rupapuro rusanzuye.
kinyarwanda.curves_formed_when_a_plane_intersects_: Imiverure ikozwe iyo urwego rwambukiranya koni (ebyiri). Inguni y'urwego ku rumurongo-rwibumba rwa koni igena ubwoko bw'umuverure.
kinyarwanda.the_only_5_convex_regular_polyhedra_al: Ni impande-nyinshi 5 zonyine ziberamye zisanzwe. Uburanga bwose ni impande-nyinshi zisanzwe zingana, umubare umwe uhurira kuri buri mpinga.
kinyarwanda.shapes_that_exhibit_self_similarity_at: Imiterere yerekana kwisa-nyawe ku rugero rwose. Yiswe na Benoît Mandelbrot (1975) iva mu kilatini fractus, "cyavunitse".
kinyarwanda.geometries_on_curved_surfaces_euclid_s: Geometiri ku buso bugoramye. Igitekerezo-shingiro cy'imirongo iteganye cya Euclide ntigikora. Byavumbuwe mu myaka ya 1820 (Lobatchevski, Bolyai, Gauss).
kinyarwanda.projecting_curved_earth_onto_a_flat_ma: Kwerekana Isi igoramye ku karita gisanzuye BURI GIHE gihindura ikintu — inguni, ubuso, intera, cyangwa imiterere. Buri iyerekana rinonosora ku bikoreshwa bitandukanye.
kinyarwanda.many_popular_claims_about_the_golden_r: Ibivugwa byinshi bizwi ku gipimo cya zahabu mu bugeni, ubwubatsi, no mu "bwiza" ntibishyigikiwe cyangwa byahimbwe nyuma. Ibiranga by'imibare ni ukuri + biryoshye; ibivugwa by'umuco kenshi si ukuri.
kinyarwanda.origami_connects_geometry_to_engineeri: Origami ihuza geometiri n'ubwubatsi, ibinyabuzima, no gushushanya. Ibitekerezo by'imibare bigenga amakunja ashoboka.
kinyarwanda.many_athletic_skills_depend_on_launch_: Ubuhanga bwinshi bwa siporo buterwa n'inguni zo koherera. Iryo risanzwe "45° ni yo nziza" ni ukuri gusa ku bintu byoherejwe + bigwa ku burebure bumwe (nta guhangana n'umuyaga).
